svg.title: SignalSmith AI system architecture
svg.desc: Six-tier architecture diagram: presentation, application, Splunk enterprise, multi-agent pipeline, shadow validation, and end-to-end flow with governance.
svg.text: Agentic Splunk telemetry optimization · Shadow validation · MCP Server · OTel export

g.text: SessionContext · REST Client / SSE · Splunk Auth Gate
Views: Command Center · Data Flow · Pipeline · Validation · Approval
Splunk Enterprise · Official MCP Server + REST + HEC
READ ONLY — never modified in place
Orchestrated by AnalysisOrchestrator · human gates on policy + approval
Shadow validation — real SPL hit counts, not stubbed pass/fail
POST /api/session/run — orchestrates all phases with SSE progress
Full audit trail logged to SQLite

svg.text: SignalSmith: cut Splunk ingest cost without cutting incident coverage
Apache 2.0 · Splunk Agentic Ops Hackathon · SignalSmith v3.0 · docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
